title: Test suite
description: Write a pytest test suite covering all ops modules and CLI commands. Use a real minimal `.pptx` fixture (generated via python-pptx in a conftest fixture) rather than mocks. Test JSON output by parsing stdout, test --plain output by string matching. Test error paths (missing files, invalid indices, conflicting flags). Test round-trip integrity: unpack → edit → pack produces a file python-pptx can re-open.
acceptance_criteria: Tests exist for `unpack`, `pack`, `clean`, `list_slides`, `list_layouts`, `add_slide` (both modes), `delete_slide`, `move_slide`, and `extract_text` in `ops/`.
CLI integration tests invoke commands via click's `CliRunner` and assert JSON output is well-formed.
`--plain` output is tested for each command.
Error paths (missing file, invalid index, conflicting --duplicate/--layout) are tested and assert non-zero exit codes.
Round-trip test: unpack a fixture → pack back → re-open with python-pptx succeeds.
